PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

  wd:Q222047 p:P1346 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P1346 ?winner ; pq:P2094 ?numWins .
  ?winner rdfs:label ?winnerLabel .

ORDER BY DESC(?totalWins)
